creator: egypcio@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Steve Wills from comment #0)

hey swills, hi.

I merged your patch to the one I have on https://reviews.freebsd.org/D19028 - an update for 'devel/hub' to version 2.8.4 (still pending).

as soon as I get it into the tree, your suggestion should also land together :)

thank you very much for the patch! appreciated though

KR,
